message:
fix(pages): empty filter semantics, export UX hardening, image race fix

Empty filter fix:
- Some(vec![]) for agent/workspace filters now correctly means "match
  nothing" (WHERE 1=0) instead of being silently converted to None
  (match everything) via .filter(|a| !a.is_empty())
- Wizard always sets self.state.workspaces including to Some(vec![])

Export improvements:
- Auto-create missing parent directories for output path
- Return proper errors for unparseable --since/--until values
- Validate that --since is not after --until

Image loading fix:
- Extract waitForImageLoad() that sets onload/onerror before img.src
- Add synchronous img.complete check to prevent hang on cached images
- Fix rawManifest.total_size_bytes check to use strict !== null

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
